inputs.label: Rebar Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Standard rebar diameters per ASTM A615/A615M. Common sizes: 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18, 20, 22, 25, 28, 32, 36, 40, 50 mm.

inputs.label: Rebar Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of rebar piece. Typical stock lengths: 6m, 12m, 18m. User can input custom length.

inputs.label: Number of Rebars
inputs.businessContext: Total number of identical rebars to calculate total weight.

inputs.label: Steel Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of steel. Standard value 7850 kg/m³ per ASTM A36. Variations for different steel grades.

inputs.label: Unit System
inputs.businessContext: Select unit system. Metric uses mm, m, kg. Imperial uses inch, ft, lb. Conversion factors applied.

rules: diameter must be between 6 and 50 mm
length must be positive and ≤ 100 m
steelDensity must be between 7800 and 7900 kg/m³

thresholds.diameter: diameter < 10 → 'Small diameter rebar, check structural requirements'

hiddenLossDrivers: diameter < 10 → 'Small diameter rebar, check structural requirements'
suggestedActions: Verify rebar grade and density with supplier
Consider using standard lengths to minimize waste
For large quantities, request volume discount

premiumFeatures: Trend analysis of weight vs diameter
Detailed report with material cost estimation
